inputs.label: Number
inputs.businessContext: The number whose logarithm base is to be converted.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number whose logarithm base is to be converted.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Zahl, deren Logarithmusbasis umgerechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre dont la base du logarithme doit être convertie.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número cuyo logaritmo en base se va a convertir.

inputs.label: From Base
inputs.businessContext: The base of the logarithm you are converting from.

businessContext_i18n.en: The base of the logarithm you are converting from.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Basis des Logarithmus, von dem Sie umrechnen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La base du logarithme que vous convertissez.
businessContext_i18n.es: La base del logaritmo que está convirtiendo.

inputs.label: To Base
inputs.businessContext: The target logarithm base to convert to.

businessContext_i18n.en: The target logarithm base to convert to.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Ziel-Logarithmusbasis, in die umgerechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La base du logarithme cible vers laquelle convertir.
businessContext_i18n.es: La base del logaritmo de destino a la que convertir.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the result.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding the result.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen zum Runden des Ergebnisses.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour arrondir le résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear el resultado.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
